case_title: GALANTE, THOMAS N. vs. JOHNSON, VIKKI LYNN

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALANTE, THOMAS N. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, VIKKI LYNN SUMMONS ISSUED
